# terrible_community_docker_docker_image_export (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `names` (String) One or more image names. Name format will be one of: `name`, `repository/name`, `registry_server:port/name`. When pushing or pulling an image the name can optionally include the tag by appending `:tag_name`. Note that image IDs (hashes) can also be used.

### Optional

- `force` (Boolean) Export the image even if the `.tar` file already exists and seems to contain the right image.
- `path` (String) The `.tar` file the image should be exported to.
- `tag` (String) Tag for the image name `name` that is to be tagged. If `name`'s format is `name:tag`, then the tag value from `name` will take precedence.

### Read-Only

- `images` (String) Image inspection results for the affected images.
